activities_projects.title: Analyse the Importance of Public Facilities
activities_projects.objective: Understand why public facilities are essential for society
steps: Write the meaning of public facilities
Explain why facilities like water, electricity, and roads are important
Describe how lack of these facilities affects people's lives
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Explains the role of public facilities in improving quality of life
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth of explanation and examples (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Case Study: Water Supply in Cities
activities_projects.objective: Understand the challenges of providing water as a public facility
steps: Research a city facing water supply problems
Write the causes of the problem
Suggest solutions that the government can implement
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Analyses real-life problems related to public facilities
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of research and explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Compare Public and Private Services
activities_projects.objective: Understand the differences between public and private provision of services
steps: Write the meaning of public services and private services
List two differences between them
Explain why some services should be provided by the government
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops analytical understanding of service systems

activities_projects.title: Survey on Public Facilities
activities_projects.objective: Understand the availability of public services in the community
steps: Survey five people about public facilities in your area
Ask them about water supply, roads, and health services
Prepare a small report based on the responses

activities_projects.title: Debate: Government vs Private Companies
activities_projects.objective: Encourage critical thinking about who should provide public facilities
steps: Prepare arguments supporting government provision of public facilities
Prepare arguments supporting private companies providing services
Present your opinion with reasons

activities_projects.title: Case Study on Inequality of Access
activities_projects.objective: Understand unequal access to public facilities
steps: Describe a situation where some people have better access to facilities than others
Explain why this inequality exists
Suggest solutions to ensure equal access

activities_projects.title: Poster on Water Conservation
activities_projects.objective: Promote responsible use of public resources
steps: Design a poster encouraging people to save water
Add slogans promoting responsible use
Explain the message of the poster

activities_projects.title: Essay on Public Welfare
activities_projects.objective: Understand how public facilities contribute to social welfare
steps: Write an essay on the importance of public facilities
Explain how they support health, education, and safety
Include examples from your locality
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Explains the link between facilities and public welfare
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity and depth of essay (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Government Responsibility Study
activities_projects.objective: Understand the responsibility of the government in providing facilities
steps: Write two responsibilities of the government related to public facilities
Explain how these responsibilities help citizens
Give real-life examples

activities_projects.title: Critical Thinking: Public Facilities in the Future
activities_projects.objective: Encourage thinking about improving public services
steps: Write three improvements needed in public facilities in your area
Explain why these improvements are important
Suggest how government and citizens can work together
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Applies civic thinking to real-life improvements
